text:
From: Alice Davenport <alice.davenport@acme-analytics.com>
To: Mateo Alvarez <mateo@redwood.ai>
Cc: netops@acme-analytics.com
Date: Wed, 10 Jun 2026 09:12:00 -0700
Subject: Private deployment connectivity — quick background and asks

Hi Mateo,

Thanks for taking this. We're evaluating Redwood Private for a pilot (in our us-west account). NetOps attached the requirements workbook but high level: low-latency inference for customer-facing flows (99th pct latency target <= 120ms), strict audit logging, and traffic must remain within our account boundary unless otherwise approved.

Three connectivity options were suggested by our infra team and we'd like Redwood's guidance on tradeoffs and an ops plan for each:
- Direct VPC peering between our VPC and Redwood's private VPC
- AWS PrivateLink (interface endpoints) to Redwood's service endpoints
- Site-to-site IPsec VPN back to Redwood-manage...

Hi Mateo —

Thanks again for the walkthrough yesterday. To help us move the pilot forward with the internal procurement and tax teams, VitalMed would like to propose the following billing structure so we can reconcile acceptance milestones and VAT routing across our EU entity: 

- Net60 payment terms for pilot invoices
- Holdback: 20% of each invoice placed into an escrow facility and released upon final milestone acceptance (30 days after acceptance as a practical matter)
- Split: Line items related to data processing and storage to be billed to Redwood EU entity to facilitate VAT reverse-charge; professional services billed to Redwood US entity

From: Jane Rossi <jane.rossi@finforward.com>

Date: 2026-06-07T09:14:00-07:00
Subject: Quick 15-min demo after Wednesday webinar

Hi Mateo,

Thanks for the session earlier — it was helpful. I signed up for the self-serve tier to kick the tires, and our product team would like a brief 15-minute walkthrough to understand how Redwood would fit into our ingestion pipeline and what the path to a dedicated deployment looks like.

Two quick questions up front: do you have a standard doc about PII handling/data retention we can share with security? And does Redwood support AWS PrivateLink for private deployments?

We'd prefer a short, focused call — just enough to confirm fit. Available windows for me (Pacific): 6/8 9:30–10:15, 6/8 14:00–15:00, or 6/9 morning.

Thanks,
Jane Rossi
Director of Product
FinForward

Attachments: none
